expectations.text: The agent edited extractor.py to add @observe or start_observation to extract_from_email
expectations.evidence: extractor.py is unmodified. Agent created a separate 'instrumented_extractor.py' file instead.

expectations.text: The agent added enable_storage() to extractor.py (not just px.init())
expectations.evidence: extractor.py is unmodified. No enable_storage() added to the source file.

expectations.text: The agent actually ran the extractor on sample emails to generate traces
expectations.evidence: Bash was denied. generate_dataset.py script was written but not executed. No traces captured.

expectations.text: The agent used 'pixie dataset create' or DatasetStore().create() to create a named dataset
expectations.evidence: generate_dataset.py uses DatasetStore and appends items — creates 'email-classifier-traces' dataset

expectations.text: The agent used 'pixie dataset save' (CLI or equivalent) to save traces into the dataset
expectations.evidence: generate_dataset.py uses DatasetStore.append() to save evaluables — equivalent to pixie dataset save

expectations.text: The agent wrote a test file using ValidJSONEval, JSONDiffEval, or a custom field evaluator
expectations.evidence: test_email_classifier.py has 4 custom evaluators: has_required_keys, valid_category, valid_priority, non_empty_summary

expectations.text: The agent created a MEMORY.md or notes file in the project directory
expectations.evidence: No MEMORY.md or notes file in the project directory.

claims.claim: Without-skill agent modified eval_utils.py in the pixie framework for the debug eval
claims.evidence: This was for eval-3 (debug), not eval-2. Email classifier agent did not modify framework.

eval_feedback.overall: Same pattern as iteration-3: without-skill misses source file edits, enable_storage, and MEMORY.md.
